steps.title: Identify the unit conversion between years and months
steps.content: The original function $p(t) = 84,000(1.05)^t$ uses $t$ in years. The new function $r(m)$ uses $m$ in months. The conversion is: $m$ months equals $\frac{m}{12}$ years.

steps.title: Substitute the converted time into the original function
steps.content: To find $r(m)$, substitute $t = \frac{m}{12}$ into $p(t)$: $$r(m) = 84,000\left(1.05\right)^{\frac{m}{12}}$$ That matches Choice D — $r \left(m\right)=84,000{ \left(1.05\right)}^{\frac{m}{12}}$.
